name: cutplate-ai
description: Full-stack Expo and Node meal planning app.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n API,APP -c green,cyan "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run web --prefix mobile"
scripts.check: npm run test --prefix server && node --check mobile/App.js
scripts.eas:ios:stage: cd mobile && npx eas build -p ios --profile preview
scripts.eas:ios:prod: cd mobile && npx eas build -p ios --profile production
scripts.eas:ios:submit: cd mobile && npx eas submit -p ios --profile production
